T0108.title: Bird-Killing Scam
T0108.definition: A scam model that lures victims with promises of easy commissions for simple online tasks, such as liking posts or following accounts. The most common variant is task-based fraud, where victims are initially paid small amounts to build trust before being defrauded of larger sums through fake investment or deposit requirements.
